title: Reimagined GUI Modded (Dark)
body:

## Credits

Original resource pack by amongstreality - [Reimagined GUI (Dark)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimaginedguidark)

This pack is an addon/extension made to match the original pack's style.
